---
title: "Projects"
---

## Featured Work

This page collects the main project work published on my website, including course projects and interactive data stories.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### DANL 410 Capstone

This capstone project asks whether NFL draft position and pre-draft information can predict wide receiver production over the first five professional seasons.

[Open Capstone](capstone/index.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Full Report](capstone/wr_draft_capstone_report.html){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### NFL Data Storytelling Project

This DANL 310 final project asks a simple question: what kind of teams make the playoffs most consistently in the modern NFL?

[Open Story](nfl/nfl-story-project.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Open Dashboard](nfl/nfl-dashboard.html){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Other Course Projects

Additional coursework and portfolio pieces are still available here on the site through the project links below.

[DANL 200 Project](../DANL200_proj.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[DANL 210 Project](../DANL210_proj.html){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
:::
